description: Order of payment issued by Abū Zikrī Kohen to his banker, Abū l-Khayr Khiyyār, instructing him to pay the household of al-Riyānī, in cash, 2 and a half dinars (and following that another) half dinar. Dated Av 1451 (= 1140 CE). A note at the upper left states ‘total of 3 dinars’. (Information from CUDL)
tags: order of payment, cheque, Abu Zikri Kohen
description_he: שטר אשראי או קבלה בGreek/Coptic Numerals, Judaeo-Arabic מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
